emails.body:
Team,

The latest validation report (v17) has been posted to the shared drive. Please review at your earliest convenience. This version incorporates the updated sensor‑fusion metrics and the revised urban‑scenario test set.

Thanks,
Josh

Josh,

Thanks for the heads‑up. I’ve attached the PDF of Validation Report v17 for the team’s reference. As a reminder, the report reflects projected performance; final validation steps are still underway.

Best,
Rebecca

Josh,

Please use the attached v17 report as the source for the upcoming briefing deck. The numbers look solid and should support the 1% error target we’re briefing.

Thanks,
James
